# Packages installed via pacman on Manjaro / Arch (official repos).
# One package per line. Lines starting with # or blank lines are ignored.
# AUR packages (1Password, Chrome, Brave, Insync, Cursor, VS Code) live in
# deps/aur.txt and are installed via yay (bootstrapped by install.sh).
git
curl
wget
zsh
stow
tmux
fzf
bat
fd
eza
git-delta
tk
libnotify
btop
htop
mc
ncdu
noto-fonts-emoji
ranger
smplayer
calibre
discord
dbeaver
tailscale
docker
docker-compose
syncthing
base-devel

# i3 desktop environment
i3-gaps
i3status
i3lock
picom
dunst
dmenu
rofi
xdotool
xautolock
nitrogen
xorg-xset
maim
xclip
flameshot
pulseaudio
pavucontrol
playerctl
pasystray
xorg-xbacklight
xfce4-power-manager
network-manager-applet
clipit
polkit-gnome
gnome-terminal
pcmanfm
moc
conky
blueman
i3-scrot
